brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year Global Limited Warranty + AppleCare option available.
brands.insights: Apple's score has improved following their public commitment to Right to Repair and expanding transparent service logs in India.

brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year Brand Warranty + 10 Years on Digital Inverter compressor/motor.
brands.insights: Samsung's trust score rose to 93 due to solid long-term parts warranties on washers and refrigerators, combined with responsive onsite service guides.

brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year Domestic Warranty for electronics. Additional panel warranties for TVs.
brands.insights: Sony continues to dominate expert scores by delivering premium acoustic technology and highly consistent TV panel lifespans.

brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year Standard Local Warranty covering manufacturing defects.
disadvantages: Cameras are good but behind Apple/Samsung
brands.insights: OnePlus's score stabilized at 88 as fast local repair vouchers and warranty centers improved turnaround speeds in key metros.

brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year Replacement Warranty. Return pick-up from home available.
disadvantages: Susceptible to quick wear and tear
brands.insights: boAt stands out for budget-oriented shoppers. Its score remains stable due to easy home product returns but is limited by basic chassis durability.

brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year Standard Replacement Warranty. Fast online claims process.
brands.insights: Noise saw a slight decline in score relative to rising smart wearables due to user-reported tracker latency spikes.

brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year Local India Warranty. Made-in-India commitment to quality.
brands.insights: Mivi's trust score rose to 88 on strong domestic assembly consistency, providing clean vocal tuning at unbeatable prices.

brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year Domestic Warranty. Panel issues replaced on-site.
advantages: Premium display finishes at half cost
brands.insights: Vu TVs showed steady trust gains based on robust on-site panel replacements and affordable cinema experiences in India.

brands.warranty_policy: 2 Year Global Warranty + Free on-site setup/demo.
disadvantages: Not conventionally famous for organic beauty/skincare creams
brands.insights: Dyson holds absolute authority on heat protection electronics, with scores rising over three years, although value indices remain highly premium.

brands.warranty_policy: No-questions-asked refund on first purchase within 14 days if unsatisfied.
disadvantages: Limited offline availability in smaller towns
brands.insights: Moxie's trust score improved dramatically over the last three years due to absolute recipe transparency, excellent community feedback, and organic safe formulas.

brands.warranty_policy: Standard batch-testing certification and product replacement guarantee.
brands.insights: L'Oreal remains a stable giant in personal care. Its score is supported by stellar brand maturity and wide-spread consumer availability.

brands.warranty_policy: Premium customer salon satisfaction guarantee.
brands.insights: Kerastase is highly regarded in professional hair therapy. Its premium score is backed by top expert ratings and clinic certifications.

brands.warranty_policy: Batch quality assurance and customer care helpline help.
brands.insights: Tresemme's trust score has seen a slight decline as consumers shift towards sulfate-free organic boutique alternatives.

brands.warranty_policy: 100% herbal authenticity and active customer replacement policy.
brands.insights: Himalaya continues to satisfy the price-conscious mass market with reliable traditional wellness, remaining stably trusted.

brands.warranty_policy: 2 Years Brand Warranty on personal care grooming electronics.
brands.insights: Panasonic's trust gains are fueled by their nanoe moisture retention tech and reliable engine durability in hairdryers.

brands.warranty_policy: 2 Year Home Service warranty. On-site inspection across 400 Indian towns.
brands.insights: Havells excels in local Indian service speed, providing prompt home inspection responses which boosts their trust trend index.

brands.warranty_policy: 2 Years International Warranty + easy service hub replacements.
disadvantages: Short cord on entry level models
brands.insights: Philips maintains a premium standard for hair care, offering top-tier temperature care and long equipment lifespans.

brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year brand warranty covering manufacturing defects.
disadvantages: Motor gets warm on heavy usage
brands.insights: Agaro is a budget favorite. Their score is stable but penalized by self-shipping requirements for rural service claims.

brands.warranty_policy: 2 to 5 Years Extended warranty with nationwide home support.
disadvantages: Traditional design aesthetics could be modernised
brands.insights: Bajaj maintains legendary standing in Indian household networks. Excellent motor rewinding access and on-call service ensure top marks.

brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year Comprehensive + 10 Years Compressor/Motor Warranty.
advantages: Excellent home assistance response in tier-2 cities
disadvantages: Digital control boards feel slightly basic
brands.insights: Godrej is historically solid, maintaining eco leadership with their 100% CFC-free cooling systems and stable local support.

brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year Complete + 5 Years Compressor Warranty.
brands.insights: Voltas products (part of Tata Group) provide a reliable cooling shield. Their budget friendly inverter line provides strong value satisfaction.

brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year brand warranty + 10 Years on Smart Inverter compressor/motor.
disadvantages: Slight software updates lag on old smart TV panels
brands.insights: LG products score matches general performance. Their motor warranties contribute strongly to long-term trust consistency.

brands.warranty_policy: 2 Year Compulsory Warranty + 12 Years on EcoSilence Drive motor.
disadvantages: Longer wash time schedules due to intensive cleaning
brands.insights: Bosch ranks among the highest in reliability, due to superb parts build quality and outstanding eco efficiency in high load environments.

brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year comprehensive + 10 Years compressor/internal motor warranty.
disadvantages: Basic plastic dial controllers on entry models
brands.insights: Whirlpool delivers robust products at value pricing. Their trust remains stable due to good lifetime performance ratios.

brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year Comprehensive + 10 Years Compressor Warranty.
disadvantages: Customer customer-service response times occupy 24-48 hrs
brands.insights: Haier holds high customer satisfaction on budget segments. Minor service delays prevent them reaching higher trust rankings.

brands.warranty_policy: 4 Years Super Comprehensive Warranty + 10 Years Spare parts availability.
brands.insights: IFB's trust score rose to 87 on the strength of their industry-leading 4-year comprehensive warranty, which offers excellent buyer peace of mind.

brands.warranty_policy: 2 Years Brand International Warranty on active elements.
advantages: Absolute pristine master level audiophile tuning
Highly reliable cable and chassis builds
brands.insights: Sennheiser matches Sony on the professional audio space, providing pristine, highly reliable acoustic transparency scores.

brands.warranty_policy: 1 Year brand product warranty covering display panels.
disadvantages: In-built ads inside smart UI launcher
Occasional video decode lag on high resolutions
brands.insights: Xiaomi remains a budget favorite for smart display features. Score is penalised by native banner ads inside core launcher panels.

products.name: Moxie Flaxseed Hair Styling Cream
products.description: 100% vegan flaxseed hair cream providing soft organic hold, deep moisture locks, and shiny curl activation without any parabens.

products.name: Kérastase Discipline Oleo-Relax Cream
products.description: Premium professional hair smoothing control cream. Calms frizz instantly with active shoreline Shorea butter extracts and heat guard technology.

products.name: L'Oréal Professionnel Liss Unlimited Cream
products.description: Expert smoothing blowout priming cream infused with Pro-Keratin oil formulas, protecting fibers up to 4 days against damp air distortion.

products.name: TRESemmé Keratin Smooth Serum Cream
products.description: Budget styling cream offering salon silky textures, protecting strands against thermal dryers with lightweight micro-silicone layers.

products.name: Himalaya Herbals Protein Hair Cream
products.description: Daily organic nourishment cream enriched with wheatgrass proteins, chickpea, and wild gooseberry supporting standard hair root health.

products.name: Dyson Supersonic Protective Styling Cream
products.description: Note: Dyson is famous for elite electronics, not beauty lotions! This is a companion heat-seal lotion developed purely for active thermal dryer users.

products.name: Dyson Supersonic Hair Dryer HD08
products.description: The gold standard of beauty tech engineering. V9 digital motor spins up to 110,000rpm, measuring temperature 40 times per second to prevent heat damage.

products.name: Philips thermoprotect Advanced Dryer
products.description: Smart 2100W hair dryer with ThermoProtect attachments, offering beautiful shine with intelligent temperature shielding elements.

products.name: Panasonic Double Ions Salon Moist Dryer
products.description: Double moisture ions dryer locking internal cuticles. Reduces static frizz, preserving natural protein moisture during styling.

products.name: Havells HD3151 1600W folding Dryer
products.description: Compact folding travel dryer. Delivers optimum airflow with gentle heat blowing, backed by Havells' nationwide 2-year on-site replacement.

products.name: Agaro Volumizer Hair Dryer and Styler
products.description: Highly budget-friendly multi-attachment hot air brush styling dryer. Ergonomic plastic frame ideal for quick daily office prep.

products.name: Apple MacBook Air M3
products.description: 13.6 Liquid Retina Display, ultra-thin lightweight aluminum frame, fast M3 8-core CPU and 10-core GPU, up to 18 hours of battery life.

products.name: Sony BRAVIA XR OLED TV
products.description: 55 4K Ultra HD smart TV with Cognitive Processor XR, Acoustic Surface Audio+, Dolby Vision, Dolby Atmos, and integrated Google TV dashboard.

products.name: Vu Masterpiece Glo QLED TV
products.description: California design aesthetics with 800 nits high bright panel, Armani gold steel finishes, 4.1 soundbar built-in, and 120Hz refresh rates.

products.name: Xiaomi Smart TV X 43 Pro
products.description: Highly budget-friendly 4K display equipped with Dolby Vision, PatchWall companion app, and standard surround acoustic projection.

products.name: Samsung Bespoke Double Door Refrigerator
products.description: 345 Liters elegant double-door convertible smart refrigerator tracking optimal cooling with AI Ecobubble technology and digital inverter compressor.

products.name: Godrej Eon Vibe Double Door 290L
products.description: Sturdy double door refrigerator with eco CFC-free agent cooling, long motor life coils, and durable internal sheet metals.

products.name: Bosch 8kg Front Load eco Dryer Washer
products.description: Unparalleled German structural design featuring stable AntiVibration blocks and extremely silent lifetime EcoSilence motors.

products.name: IFB Aqua-Soft Front Load 7.5kg Washer
products.description: Super durable Indian washing engine backed by an absolute 4-year home warranty and internal water softening chemical protection modules.

products.name: Bajaj Majesty DX-7 Dry Iron Model
products.description: Legendary Indian household workhorse iron. Double ceramic coated thermal plate, virtually shock-proof chassis, and lifetime rewinding support.

products.name: Voltas Beko Smart solo Microwave oven
products.description: Rugged budget microwave oven built in collaboration with Beko. Highly stable thermal dispersion and 3 years comprehensive warranty.

products.name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Studio Headphones
products.description: Industry-leading active noise cancelling overhead headphones with multi-microphone noise sensor, carbon fiber drivers, and 30 hours batter life.

products.name: Sennheiser Momentum 4 premium Wireless
products.description: Audiophile-grade 42mm transducer system delivering pristine audio clarity, coupled with a record-holding 60-hour active battery lifespan.

products.name: boAt Rockerz 450 Pro Wireless
products.description: Affordable dynamic supra-aural headphones with padded ear cups, voice assistants ready, and 15 hours non-stop playground playback.

reviews.author: Rahul Sharma
reviews.review_text: Absolutely stunning device. The build quality in Titanium is next level. The reviews on Amazon are genuine, solid battery life.

reviews.author: Pooja Roy
reviews.review_text: The phone is incredible but extremely expensive. Value for money is average but premium quality makes up for it.

reviews.author: Amit K.
reviews.review_text: Satisfactory given the low price. However, the warranty claims are difficult. Saw multiple identical copy-paste reviews online.

reviews.author: Sneha G.
reviews.review_text: Cheap plastic feel, item stopped working in 2 weeks. The customer service center told me replacement will take a full month. Highly suspicious ratings.
